NDAA_PROHIBITED_VENDORS.title: NDAA Section 889 — Prohibited Manufacturers
NDAA_PROHIBITED_VENDORS.description: Cameras, video surveillance equipment, and network gear from these manufacturers are prohibited in federal contracts and any project using federal funds.

NEC_110_26_WORKING_SPACE.title: NEC 110.26 — Working Space Around Electrical Equipment
NEC_110_26_WORKING_SPACE.description: Minimum 36" clear working space required in front of panels/controllers operating 150–600V.

IBC_1010_DELAYED_EGRESS_ASSEMBLY.title: IBC 1010.1.9.8 — Delayed Egress Locks Prohibited in Assembly
IBC_1010_DELAYED_EGRESS_ASSEMBLY.description: Delayed egress locking is prohibited in Assembly occupancies regardless of occupant load.

NFPA_80_MAGLOCK_FIRE_RATED.title: NFPA 80 6.4.4 — Maglocks on Fire-Rated Doors
NFPA_80_MAGLOCK_FIRE_RATED.description: Maglocks are prohibited on fire-rated door assemblies because they compromise the rated closure.

IEC_62676_4_RECOGNITION_PPF.title: IEC 62676-4 — Minimum Recognition Pixel Density
IEC_62676_4_RECOGNITION_PPF.description: Cameras intended for recognition-level use must achieve ≥38 PPF at the target distance.

UL_2050_HIGH_SECURITY.title: UL 2050 — National Industrial Security Systems
UL_2050_HIGH_SECURITY.description: Projects classified for DoD/Intelligence Community work require UL 2050 listed monitoring.

UL_294_ACCESS_CONTROL.title: UL 294 — Access Control System Units
UL_294_ACCESS_CONTROL.description: All access control controllers and readers on commercial projects should be UL 294 listed.

ADA_309_4_REACH_RANGE.title: ADA 309.4 — Operable Parts Reach Range
ADA_309_4_REACH_RANGE.description: Card readers and operable controls must be between 15" and 48" AFF for forward reach.
